Completé starterCode con patrones del iDo del mismo subtopic en el paquete.

selfcheck.question: entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score deben…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: do not collapse ER with relationship signals — scores stay separate on the case card/ficha.

selfcheck.question: Un false positive de ER implica…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: packet says an FP does not imply fraud — it is an identity matching error, not a legal fraud verdict. Auto-parentesco or 'confirmed fraud' over-reads the score.

selfcheck.question: En zona gris de score el sistema debe…
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: grey-zone thresholds: needs_review / abstain; never auto_fraud=true or is_family=true.

selfcheck.question: CF-1 en S13 incluye…

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [A2-Skeptic second full walk] Skeptic: CF-1 artifacts: Privacy sheet, access roles, green tests, one-command demo, runbook (incl. PII-in-log incident) — not DL-only or hardcoded tokens.

selfcheck.question: Level-1 regression notes en el You Do exigen…
